t_ch: 嗯？你不知道吗，这是现在最流行的{RUBY_B#梗}模因{RUBY_E#}。源自芮克先生的新作《银河忍法帖》！
t_en: Hmm? Don't you know, this is the most popular {RUBY_B#mimeme}meme{RUBY_E#} right now. It originated from Mr. Reca's latest work, the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!

t_ch: 这家伙，是不是还没付片酬啊…对了，蒙塔娜，你现在还喜欢睡蕉小猴吗？
t_en: That guy... I don't think he has paid our salary yet... By the way, Montana, do you still like Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴？哈哈，你怎么提这么过气的东西啊。
t_en: Slumbernana Monkey? Haha, that's so last year.

t_ch: 过气？你昨天还在流梦礁……
t_en: Last year? Just yesterday at Dreamflux Reef, you were...

t_ch: 流梦礁，那是哪？
t_en: Dreamflux Reef? Where is that?

t_ch: 好了，三月七同学，现在流行的是《银河忍法帖》！你要赶得上潮流才行！
t_en: Alright March 7th, the latest trend now is the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions! You have to keep up with the trends!

t_ch: 我要去参加「观忍社」的活动了，待会一起来吗！
t_en: I'm going to the Ninja Appreciation Society's event now. Do you want to come along?

t_ch: 不、不了！我要去看看彩梦校庆的新开幕式！
t_en: N—No thanks! I'm heading to the opening ceremony of the Dreamlight Anniversary!

t_ch: 了解——那么告辞，三月•忍者。
t_en: Understood — then farewell, Ninja March.

t_ch: 是琉璃•忍者才对，告辞！
t_en: That's Ninja Ruri to you! Farewell!

t_ch: 这就是匹诺康尼的潮流更替吗……
t_en: So, is this what they mean by the rise and fall of trends in Penacony...

t_ch: 恰丽卡，你做的点心太好吃了！
t_en: Chaletka, the desserts that you made are so delicious!

t_ch: 再给我一份，再给我一份！
t_en: Give me one more, give me one more!

t_ch: 各、各位同学…排好队，人人都有份！
t_en: F—Fellow students... There's enough for everyone, so please queue up!

t_ch: 恰丽卡，你简直就是个做甜点的天才！
t_en: Chaletka, you're simply a genius of dessert making.

t_ch: 谢、谢谢！或许毕业后…去当个甜品师也不错……
t_en: Th—Thank you! Maybe becoming a patissier... after graduating doesn't sound too bad either...

t_ch: （看来恰丽卡学姐好像找到自己的「忍符」了……）
t_en: (It seems like Chaletka has also found her own way of the ninja...)

t_ch: 儿子，我想通了。如果你太累了，我们就回老家……
t_en: Son, I've thought it through. If you're too tired, let's just return to our hometown...

t_ch: 不，老爹，我不回去。
t_en: No, Dad, I'm not going back.

t_ch: 我这次在校庆上赚了一大笔——虽然我的理论课不行，但以后可以当个销售嘛，在匹诺康尼也能养活自己！
t_en: I've earned a fortune during the anniversary celebration — even though I don't do well in my theory courses, I can still become a salesperson in the future and make a great living!

t_ch: 你瞧着吧，老爹，我今后一定能在匹诺康尼闯出个名堂来！
t_en: Just watch, Dad. I'll be sure to make a name for myself in Penacony!

t_ch: 儿子…呵呵，或许我这个当爹的也该更努力一点吧……
t_en: Son... Heh, as your dad, perhaps I should also try a little harder...

t_ch: （富贵和他的父亲好像已经想通了……）
t_en: (It seems like Richie and his father have figured it out...)

t_ch: 芭蕉花酱，听说你要出演芮克先生的新片了？
t_en: Nanabloom-chan, I heard you're going to be featured in Mr. Reca's new film!

t_ch: 啊哈哈，只是个无关紧要的小角色而已。
t_en: Ahahaha, I'm just going to be a minor character.

t_ch: 今后你一定会成为大明星的，先给我签个名吧！
t_en: I'm sure you'll become a superstar one day. Can I get your autograph in advance?

t_ch: 当然没问题…喏，拿去吧！
t_en: Of course... Here, take it!

t_ch: 谢谢，但嘉宝娜…是谁啊？
t_en: Thank you. But who is this... Gabbana?

t_ch: 是我的名字——以后我不用艺名了，既然要当我的粉丝，就要记住我的名字哦。
t_en: That's my name — I'm not going to use a stage name anymore. So, if you're going to be my fan, please remember that my name is Gabbana.

t_ch: （芭蕉花酱…不，嘉宝娜也得到了大家的认可……）
t_en: (Nanabloom-chan... or I should say, Gabbana has gained some recognition...)

t_ch: 姬子姐姐，杨叔，你们也来了！
t_en: Himeko, Mr. Yang, you're here as well!

t_ch: 是啊，听说校庆突然延期，我们就尽早结束了研讨会，也想来凑个热闹。
t_en: That's right. We heard the anniversary celebration had been delayed, so we wrapped up the conference early and came straight here to see if we could catch the fun.

t_ch: 怎么样，这段时间的校园生活还愉快吗？
t_en: How was it? Did you enjoy your time on campus?

t_ch: 太愉快了。
t_en: It was amazing.

t_ch: 那就好，人们常说学校里的日子是人生中最快乐的时光，你今后一定不会忘记的。
t_en: Glad to hear it. People say that academic years are some of the happiest of their lives. I'm sure you'll be leaving with fond memories.

t_ch: 一点也不！
t_en: It wasn't fun at all!

t_ch: 呵呵，看来{NICKNAME}不怎么喜欢上学呢。没关系，人生本就是一场求学的旅程，宇宙本身就是一个巨大的学校。
t_en: Haha, not an eager student, {NICKNAME}? Never mind — life itself is a journey of study, the universe a boundless ocean of learning.

t_ch: 遇到了一些意外…
t_en: We ran into some trouble...

t_ch: 是吗？看来你们的学习生涯没那么悠闲啊。没关系，比起平凡的生活，意外才是青春中最难忘的事情。
t_en: Is that so? Sounds like student life wasn't boring after all. Look on the bright side — sometimes the most memorable things are the accidents of our youth.

t_ch: 快看，知更鸟小姐来了——
t_en: Look! Miss Robin is here...

t_ch: 各位同学们，你们好。很高兴能为大家主持这次的「彩梦校庆」。
t_en: Hello, students. I'm very happy to be hosting the Dreamlight Anniversary this year.

t_ch: 天呐，是真的知更鸟小姐！这次开幕式可比上次强多了！
t_en: Oh gosh, it really is Miss Robin! The opening ceremony this year is much better than last time!

t_ch: 等等，上次演讲的是谁来着？
t_en: Hold on, who was the speaker last time?

t_ch: 呃…想不起来了。
t_en: Uhhhhh... I don't remember.

t_ch: 很久以前，我也曾在折纸大学修习过一段时光，所以也算是大家的同学。
t_en: A long time ago, I also spent some time studying at Paperfold University. So, I can be considered an alumnus of the school.

t_ch: 那时的折纸大学和现在一样，算不上多么自由自在，也有让人头疼的考试，各种各样的作业，要求严苛的答辩…没办法，谁叫这里承担着培养未来的重任呢？
t_en: Paperfold University back then was just like how it is right now. There was a lack of freedom, exams were a source of headaches, we had plenty of homework, and our thesis defense had stringent requirements... Well, it can't be helped since this place bears the burden of training the future of Penacony.

t_ch: 只有在每年的彩梦校庆期间，同学们才能暂时抛去那些烦恼。但校庆终有一天会结束，就像梦…总有一天也会醒。
t_en: The annual Dreamlight Anniversary is the opportunity for students to temporarily toss their troubles aside. However, the anniversary celebrations will come to an end, just like how... we'll eventually awaken from our dreams.

t_ch: 但有一种梦不会醒来，也不应该醒来——
t_en: But there is a type of dream that we will never awaken from, and should never awaken from...

t_ch: 这个梦，就是我们的梦想。
t_en: And that is the dreams woven by our highest ambitions.

t_ch: 有的同学想要创造美好的事物、有的同学想要拥有美好的生活、有的同学想要让自己成为美好的人——这些梦想都很棒。
t_en: Some students wish to create beautiful objects, while others desire to lead amazing lives. There are some who even wish to become a better person. These are all amazing dreams.

t_ch: 梦想是生命的航标。只要点亮了这个航标，我们随时都可以休息。但这并不意味着放弃，因为只要看到航标的光，我们就有勇气重新启程。
t_en: In our lives, dreams act as beacons that guide us forward. Once we have lit up the beacon, we may choose to rest at any time. This does not signify that we have given up, for as long as the light of the beacon can be seen, we will have the courage to restart our journey.

t_ch: 希望大家能在折纸大学找到自己的梦想，然后用一生来贯彻它。
t_en: I hope that all of you will be able to find your dreams at Paperfold University and will dedicate your lives to realizing them.

t_ch: 因为你们有美梦，才能创造多彩。你们有理想，才能拥抱自由。
t_en: It is because of your sweet dreams that you can create color. It is because of your ideals that you can embrace freedom.

t_ch: 欢迎来到彩梦校庆！美梦多彩，理想自由——！
t_en: Welcome to Dreamlight Anniversary! Color your dreams, free your ideals!

t_ch: <size=36>美梦多彩，理想自由！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Color your dreams, free your ideals!</size>

t_ch: 美梦多彩，理想自由！
t_en: Color your dreams, free your ideals!

t_ch: 此处虽与邪恶国度相似，但也并无任何线索…
t_en: Despite the similarities to the Evil Realm, there are no clues here...

t_ch: …哟，虾蟇•忍者。
t_en: ...Yo, Ninja Gama.

t_ch: 真希望下一场戏，你能给我换个称呼，我的好演员。
t_en: How I wish that in the next film, you can call me something better, my wonderful actor.

t_ch: 只有你一个人吗？
t_en: Are you alone?

t_ch: 每位忍侠都有自己的「猎物」，银枪•修罗殿下此次只是人情相助，当下已去继续他的狩猎了。
t_en: Each Ninja Hero has their own prey. Silvergun Shura only came to repay a favor, after which he returned to his own hunt.

t_ch: 阁下有什么事吗？
t_en: Is anything the matter?

t_ch: 呵呵，你帮我拍摄了这么精彩的影片，我是来奉上片酬的。
t_en: Hehe, after helping me shoot such an exciting film, I'm here to hand you your remuneration.

t_ch: 酬谢就不必了，在下行侠只为心中忍道，从不贪慕财物。
t_en: A reward won't be necessary. I'm only acting according to my way of the ninja. Riches are not what I desire.

t_ch: 别这么说，你一定会对这份片酬感兴趣的，因为这份片酬的内容是……
t_en: Don't say that. I'm sure you'll be very interested in my remuneration. After all, this remuneration is...

t_ch: ——关于原始博士的去向。
t_en: ...about where Dr. Primitive went.

t_ch: （据芮克先生所说，用这台摄影机就可以前往最后的「片场」了蕉。）
t_en: (Mr. Reca said using this camera will help me get to the final set, bana.)

t_ch: （…快出发吧，真的不想再「蕉」了蕉。）
t_en: (...Yes, let's hurry up and get there. Please no more "bana," bana.)

t_ch: 那不是蒙塔娜和其他同学们吗？他们也回来了！
t_en: Isn't that Montana and the other classmates? They're back!

t_ch: 快看，是姬子姐姐和杨叔！
t_en: Look! It's Himeko and Mr. Yang!

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》\n最终章 忍众猎猿颠倒梦破之卷
t_en: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions\nThe Final Chapter: Upturned Dreamfall
Bana...

t_ch: 一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！
t_en: An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernanas!

t_ch: 再熟悉不过的*蕉声*响起，你脑海中本就蠢蠢欲动的小猴们开始鸣叫……
t_en: The familiar Banagibberish rings out, and the monkeys in your mind start making noise...

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
t_en: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

t_ch: 缭乱•忍法•正觉彩墨绽！
t_en: Dazzling Ninjutsu: Brilliant Enlightenment!

t_ch: …刚刚的*蕉声*消失了。
t_en: ...The Banagibberish sounds from before have stopped.

t_ch: 诸位，在下用忍符破除了邪祟的幻术。现在可否清醒了？
t_en: I shattered the fiendling's deception with my ninja talismans. Has everyone snapped out of their trance?

t_ch: 看来芮克先生没有骗我们，你的记忆确实可以消解睡蕉小猴的影响…我们的话语也恢复正常了。
t_en: Looks like Mr. Reca did tell the truth. Your memory worked in overwriting the Slumbernana Monkeys' influences. Our speech seems to have gone back to normal too.

t_ch: 这里就是「睡蕉的时刻」吗？到处都是睡蕉小猴的踪迹，它们应该都是折纸大学和流梦礁的*蕉粉*吧。
t_en: Is this the Moment of Slumbernana? This place is crawling with Slumbernana Monkeys. I'm guessing they're the Ripe Bananas from Paperfold University and Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 我来过这里！
t_en: I've been here before!

t_ch: 这就是我说过的怪梦！
t_en: This is the strange dream I mentioned!

t_ch: 没错，这里无疑是在下曾与{NICKNAME}•忍者到访过的幻境，但当时还未有如此多的邪祟。看来受到邪术迫害的人越来越多了……
t_en: That is true. This is undoubtedly the illusory realm Ninja {NICKNAME} and I had once visited. There were not as many fiendlings around back then. Looks like more and more people are being afflicted by the sorcery...

t_ch: 这些都是阁下做的好事吧——邪祟•总长。
t_en: Fiendling Chief... You're behind all of this, aren't you?

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉，可惜，如果不是搅局的变量太多，这里还能变得更加热闹。
t_en: Bana tsk, what a waste. If it wasn't for so many variables disrupting the plan, this place would have been even more bustling.

t_ch: 接下来还有更可惜的事情——你的实验马上就要失败了。
t_en: You know what's even more of a waste? Your experiment's on its way to failure.

t_ch: 我想，你们是计划用她大脑里的病毒摧毁这里吧。
t_en: Let me make a guess. You want to destroy this place with the virus in her head?

t_ch: 但看看这些小猴吧。你们当真觉得，一本早就过时的漫画能盖过梦境中最火热的风潮么？
t_en: But look at all these monkeys! Do you really think that dated manga can replace the most fervent trend in the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 这当然做不到。在下也无意逼迫忍徒们踏上缭乱•忍道。
t_en: Of course that wouldn't work. Neither do I have any intentions of pushing ninja initiates to adopt the Way of the Dazzling Ninja.

t_ch: 我等要做的，只是唤醒这些失意的百姓，令波涛汹涌的邪祟浪潮重归平息。
t_en: All we need to do is bring those disillusioned fans back to their senses to quell the rogue waves of fiendlings.

t_ch: 我们不需要让睡蕉小猴被忍者故事取代，只需喊醒茫然自失的人们，模因病毒的力量就会被大幅削弱。
t_en: There's no need to replace Slumbernana Monkeys with ninjas. We just have to snap them back to their senses. That alone is enough to undermine the influence of the memetic virus.

t_ch: 而当他们都不再盲目追逐睡蕉小猴时，我们就能轻易摧毁这场梦境。
t_en: And when people no longer blindly follow Slumbernana Monkey, we will be able to easily destroy this Dreamscape.

t_ch: 看来那个忆者*蕉*给了你们一些不该学的东西。既然如此……
t_en: Hmph, looks like that Memokeeper gave you guys some banatips that good students shouldn't know about. In that case...

t_ch: 我只能为各位递上「期末考试」了。
t_en: I can only issue the "final exam" to you.

t_ch: 那就来吧，在下随时愿意接受阁下的挑战。
t_en: Bring it on. I'm ready for your challenge.

t_ch: 为何宣战后立刻逃遁，甚是卑鄙！
t_en: Laying down your challenge only to abscond? Despicable!

t_ch: 别跑！
t_en: Stop right there!

t_ch: 真怂啊！
t_en: Coward!!!

t_ch: 哼，想逃？
t_en: Hmph, think you can escape?

t_ch: 虽然不知道他想做什么，但还是尽量解决掉周围的睡蕉小猴吧——毕竟最大的威胁还是模因病毒。
t_en: I can't tell what's up his sleeve, but we should take care of these Slumbernana Monkeys as soon as possible. Stopping the memetic virus is still our priority for now.

t_ch: 飞龙忍者所言极是，在下已将「超•忍•卷轴」交予诸位，就用空手道来令踏上邪祟之道的忍徒们醒悟吧！
t_en: Ninja Hiryū is right. Since I have already relinquished the Super Ninja Scroll, I'll rely on my fists to awaken these ninja initiates that succumbed to the way of the fiendling.

t_ch: 「潮流」即是公众的欲望所向，在「同谐」的美梦中，它等同于力量。
t_en: Fashionable trends are what drive people. In the sweet dreams of Harmony, this is equivalent to strength.

t_ch: 邪祟•总长乘坐这台忍•科学•弹丸离开了，我等也快追上去吧！
t_en: The Fiendling Chief left atop this ninja tech bullet! Let us quickly give chase!

t_ch: 现在的「核心」里有多少实验品的心愿呢，一千？一万？
t_en: How many of the experimental subjects' wishes have been collected inside the core so far? A thousand? Ten thousand?

t_ch: 「物尽其用」，就拿这些成果来为今后的实验抹平障碍吧……
t_en: We should fully utilize what we have. These results will pave the way and eliminate any obstacles in our future experiments...

t_ch: 别再把时间浪费在没用的试题上了，马上就要交卷了……
t_en: Stop wasting your time on useless questions, it's almost time to hand in your papers...

t_ch: 等等，它好像在刻意把我们引向那里……
t_en: Hold on, it seems to be intentionally guiding us toward there...

t_ch: 飞龙忍者，无需犹豫。若有埋伏，便破埋伏；若有诡计，便破诡计。
t_en: There's no need for hesitation, Ninja Hiryū. If there's an ambush, we foil the ambush. If there's a scheme, we thwart the scheme.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉（笑）…如此完美的实验成果，用来清除害虫还真是可惜……
t_en: Banahaha... Such perfect experimental results. It would be a waste to use it to eliminate you pests...

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉…实验的成果有所损坏，但用来清除害虫也足够了……
t_en: Banahaha... Despite the imperfections in the experimental results, it's more than sufficient for eliminating you pests...

t_ch: 蕉（无奈）…实验成果居然受到了这么大的损伤，你们这群差生……
t_en: Bana... The experimental results have been so badly damaged. You're such a bunch of unruly students...

t_ch: 邪祟•总长，阁下已无处可逃，面对缭乱•忍法的制裁吧。
t_en: Fiendling Chief, there's nowhere left to run. It's time to face your punishment delivered by my Dazzling Ninjutsu!

t_ch: 「AK-A-3」，承载着返祖实验进从<unbreak>32</unbreak>个文明中筛选出的优质灵长类基因，却因一位见习研究猿的错误培养而误入歧途。
t_en: "AK-A-3," carrying high-quality primate genes selected from <unbreak>32</unbreak> civilizations for the atavistic experiment, went astray due to a trainee research ape's erroneous cultivation

t_ch: 而这位见习研究猿还不知悔改，私通巡海游侠，为实验室带来无比惨重的损失，最终只留下了一件极其糟糕的「失败品」——
t_en: Moreover, that trainee research ape showed no remorse and even colluded with the Galaxy Rangers, resulting in a devastating loss for the laboratory. In the end, we're only left with an abysmal piece of "failure"...

t_ch: 只懂得听命邪忍，为害四方的邪祟，有何资格评判在下。
t_en: You're a fiendling who only knows how to take orders from the Evil Ninja and go around causing trouble. What right do you have to judge me?

t_ch: 当然是凭借…「梦想」。
t_en: Of course, it's because of... my dreams.

t_ch: 让我们延续之前的课题吧：香蕉是无性繁殖的植物。一个块茎可以滋生无数香蕉树，从而诞生出一大片香蕉林，解决一整个星系乃至宇宙的饥荒。
t_en: Let us continue from where the previous lecture left off: Bananas are plants that propagate asexually. Each rhizome can bear several buds that will grow into a sea of banana trees, thus eliminating hunger problems plaguing planets and perhaps even the entire universe.

t_ch: 而那些自私的植物，强调着「个性」与「自我」，却将种子肆意播撒，野蛮生长。只知道延续自己的基因，却不知为同类奉献。
t_en: As for the selfish plants that place emphasis on personality and individuality, they will willfully spread their seeds and grow uncultivated. They only care about whether their genes are passed on but do not know to contribute to the cause of their kind.

t_ch: 告诉我，从宇宙的尺度望去，应该被淘汰的是谁，应该被留下的又是谁？
t_en: Tell me, on a cosmic scale, which should be eliminated, and which should be left to thrive?

t_ch: ——够了，阁下快住嘴吧。
t_en: Enough! Just shut up.

t_ch: 开学时，你让大家追随自由，如今却讥讽着自由的意义。先前判定香蕉是失败的植物，现在又开始赞颂它的无私。
t_en: When school started, you encouraged everyone to pursue their desires freely, but now you ridicule what it means to be free. Previously, you judged bananas to be a failed plant, but now you are singing praises of their selflessness.

t_ch: 呃…这…这是不同的语境，你不能一概而论……
t_en: Ugh... This... The context is different. You can't generalize it in this manner...

t_ch: 恶人做恶事永远都有无数的借口，总想要将自己摆在正义的位置上。
t_en: When evil people do evil things, they always have a myriad of excuses to try and justify their own actions.

t_ch: 自相矛盾，强词夺理，只为自己的欲望。这种课根本没有听的必要——
t_en: You're self-contradictory and unreasonable, only striving to further your own agenda. There's no need to listen to such lessons!

t_ch: 邪祟•总长，比起编造狂言，不如好好构想阁下的辞世句吧！
t_en: Fiendling Chief, rather than continuing to weave lies, why don't you think about your last words!

t_ch: 下课了！
t_en: Class is dismissed!

t_ch: 放学了！
t_en: School is over!

t_ch: 毕业了！
t_en: Time for graduation!

t_ch: 失败品…你们都是不可*蕉化*的失败品。
t_en: Failures... A bunch of failures that cannot be cultivated.

t_ch: 对于失败品而言，天才的「智识」遥不可及。但我可以用更「原始」的方式*蕉*会你们这个道理……
t_en: How can failures possibly comprehend the Erudition of a genius? However, I can always rely on primitive methods to banaducate you on this theory...

t_ch: 看到这颗美丽的梦泡了吗，家族用万千家徒「同谐」的心愿与星核的力量筑造了匹诺康尼，而我则将万千小猴「放弃」的心愿汇聚为这个梦泡，筑造了「睡蕉的时刻」。
t_en: See this beautiful dream bubble? The Family relied on the Harmonious wishes of thousands of Family members and the power of the Stellaron to construct Penacony. But I simply gathered and converged the abandoned wishes of thousands of monkeys into this dream bubble to create the Moment of Slumbernana.

t_ch: 现在，我会将它所有的力量交予诸位「蕉师」与「助蕉」——
t_en: Now, I will hand over its power to all BananAdvisors and Assistananas...

t_ch: 小猴的数量实在太多了，最好尽量解决掉它们。
t_en: There are too many monkeys. It's best that we try to eliminate them.

t_ch: 在下的忍法只会将邪祟送出此处，莫要担心，尽情施展忍•空手道吧！
t_en: My ninja arts will only send the fiendlings out of this place. Fret not, freely use my ninja fist!

t_ch: 糟糕，在下的忍力不足了。
t_en: Oh no, my ninja power is dwindling.

t_ch: 此处姹紫色的忍•泡影秘药似乎能补充忍力，击破此物来补充忍力吧。
t_en: This purple Ninja Secret Brew seems like it would replenish my ninja power. Shatter it and replenish some ninja power.

t_ch: 休要继续逃窜，若阁下有战胜我等的信心，何不一决高下？！
t_en: Stop trying to escape. If you believe that you can defeat us, why not settle it once and for all right now!?

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉，还没到上课时间，别心急。
t_en: Bana bana bana, it's not time for class yet. There's no need to be in such a hurry.

t_ch: 这些漂浮的密咒都是忍徒们的心音吗？看来他们之所以放弃忍道，不只因为邪祟•总长的蛊惑。
t_en: Are these floating mantras the inner voices of those ninja initiates? It seems the Fiendling Chief's beguiling isn't the only reason they gave up on the way of the ninja.

t_ch: 是的。匹诺康尼的生活并非表面那么理想。站在悬崖的边缘，轻风也能将人推入谷底。
t_en: That's right. Life in Penacony is not as ideal as what is seen on the surface. If someone is standing on the edge of a cliff, even a gentle breeze can easily tip them over.

t_ch: 但我等必须令这阵风止息——哪怕忍徒渴望纵身一跃，也必须是自己的选择，而非妖风所致。
t_en: We have to stop this breeze from growing. Even if the ninja initiates decide to make the leap, it should be a conscious choice of their own, and not sorcery that coerced them into it.

t_ch: 快点追吧，来吧，教室就在前面了。
t_en: Hurry up and give chase. Come on, the classroom is just ahead.

t_ch: 小猴的数量变多了，看来我们离梦境的核心越来越近了。
t_en: There is an increasing number of monkeys. It seems like we are getting closer and closer to the core of this dreamscape.

t_ch: 诸般迷失的邪祟啊，速速惊觉…继而寻回自己的忍道吧！
t_en: Oh, disillusioned fiendlings... Awaken now and continue down the path to seek your own way of the ninja!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bananana! Bananana!

t_ch: 这群小猴好像正在阻拦我们……
t_en: This bunch of monkeys seems like they are trying to stop us...

t_ch: 那就令它们全部醒悟吧！
t_en: Then let us snap them all out of their disillusionment!

t_ch: 睡蕉小猴的数量越来越少了，病毒的强度一定也会有所削减。
t_en: The number of Slumbernana Monkeys seems to be declining. The virus must have also been weakened somewhat.

t_ch: 邪祟已然所剩无几，战况值得欢喜！
t_en: There aren't many fiendlings left. This is cause for us to rejoice!

t_ch: 此处是在下与{NICKNAME}曾经相遇之地。看来壮绝狩猎的起点亦是终点，实属巧妙•因缘——
t_en: This is the place where I met {NICKNAME} before. It seems like the starting point of this formidable hunt will also be where it shall be concluded. How ingenious fate is...

t_ch: ——邪祟就在此地。
t_en: ...for the fiendlings to be here.

t_ch: 邪祟退却——正觉彩墨绽！
t_en: Fiendlings, be gone! Brilliant Enlightenment!

t_ch: 蕉蕉！睡蕉小猴的力量保护了我们！
t_en: Banahaha! The power of the Slumbernana Monkey is protecting us!

t_ch: 邪祟退却——超•正觉彩墨绽！
t_en: Fiendlings, be gone! Super Brilliant Enlightenment!

t_ch: 蕉…睡蕉小猴的力量被削弱了……
t_en: Bana ugh... The power of the Slumbernana Monkey has been weakened...

t_ch: 邪祟退却——极•正觉彩墨绽！
t_en: Fiendlings, be gone! Ultimate Brilliant Enlightenment!

t_ch: 蕉！蕉糕…睡蕉小猴的力量都不见了……
t_en: Bana wha! Holy bananas... The power of the Slumbernana Monkey has disappeared...

t_ch: 差生们，你们已经严重违反了蕉学规范。
t_en: You bunch of unruly students have seriously violated the banacademic code of conduct.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉，准备好接受处分吧！
t_en: Bana bana bana! Prepare to be disciplined!

t_ch: 暴力即是原初的「智识」——这就是*蕉育*的力量！
t_en: Violence is the most primitive form of Erudition — this is the power of Bananenlightenment!

t_ch: *蕉学*失败……
t_en: Banacademics failed...

t_ch: 时钟的指针拨回匹诺康尼之旅起点：星穹列车应「钟表匠」邀请，前往银河度假胜地「白日梦」酒店赴宴，却在美梦乐园意外被卷入两起离奇的「杀人案件」。
t_en: The clock winds back to the start of the journey to Penacony — the Astral Express, upon invitation from the Watchmaker, heads to a Cosmic vacation spot, The Reverie hotel, for a banquet. However, in this Sweetdream Paradise, they unexpectedly become entangled in two bizarre "murder mysteries."

t_ch: 声势浩大的遗产争夺战拉开序幕。众多派系先后入场，因势而动，家族东道主也意图借机将「钟表匠」捉拿归案，令谐乐大典如期召开。
t_en: A grand struggle for a legacy begins. Numerous factions enter one after another, acting in response to the situation. The Family hosts also plot to capture the Watchmaker with this opportunity and ensure the Charmony Festival takes place as scheduled.

t_ch: 「虚无」令使黄泉与公司使节砂金的对决成为整起事件的转折点：后者借一场「盛大的死亡」粉碎了家族的谎言，也揭示了原初梦境「流梦礁」的存在。
t_en: A confrontation between the Emanator of the Nihility, Acheron, and IPC representative, Aventurine, becomes the turning point of the entire event: The latter, through a "grand death," shatters The Family's lies and reveals the existence of the Primordial Dreamscape, Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 列车组由此深入事件核心。在这里，加拉赫向众人讲述了梦境、星核以及米哈伊尔等无名客的真相。众人终于寻得「开拓」的遗产，更因此蒙受「同谐」瞥视。
t_en: The Express Crew thus delves into the heart of the situation. Here, Gallagher reveals to everyone the truths about the dreamscape, the Stellaron, Mikhail, and the other Nameless. They finally uncover the legacy of the Trailblaze and, in doing so, receive a glimpse from the Harmony.

t_ch: 为实现前人的遗愿，众人向匹诺康尼大剧院进发，意图封印星核，却不得不与心向「秩序」的橡木家主星期日决一死战，而这场大战以「秩序」的再度陨落作结。
t_en: To fulfill the wishes of their predecessors, everyone heads to the Penacony Grand Theater with the intention of sealing the Stellaron. However, they are forced into a deadly battle against Sunday, the head of the Oak family, who is aligned with the Order. This great battle concludes with the fall of the Order once again.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的未来依旧悬而未决。可喜的是，经列车组斡旋，家族与公司同意让渡部分权益，达成一致。匹诺康尼重新获得了决定自己命运的权利。
t_en: The future of Penacony remains uncertain. However, thanks to the mediation of the Crew, The Family and the IPC agree to cede some of their interests, and reach a consensus. Penacony regains the right to determine its own destiny.

t_ch: 最后的最后，花火隆重返场，上演了一出触目惊心的炸弹秀。这场「危机」最终在盛大的烟火中落幕，每个人都收获了各自最好的结局，美梦的悲喜剧落下帷幕。
t_en: In the very end, Sparkle makes a grand return with a startling bomb show. This "crisis" is ultimately resolved amidst spectacular fireworks. With everyone receiving their own best ending, the tragicomedy of the sweet dream comes to a close.

t_en: Start creating

t_ch: 此刻，缭乱•忍侠被热情的忍徒们团团包围，有如落网之鱼，难以脱身。
t_en: At this moment, the Dazzling Ninja is surrounded by enthusiastic ninja disciples like a fish caught in a net, rendering her unable to escape.

t_ch: 忍法或许可以轻易从群敌环伺的恶意中脱身，但却难以抵御汹涌的善意。大岚天在上，热情炽热胜烈火，忍•心亦难解人心。
t_en: Perhaps Ninjutsu can allow her to easily slip away from the encirclement of enemies, but such a power is helpless against surging kindness. By Great Lan above, these passions burn hotter than fire. Even the heart of ninjutsu finds it hard to decipher the human heart.

t_ch: 当你跨入此门，梦境的空间开始扭曲，你又来到了芮克先生的片场……
t_en: When you enter this door, the Dreamscape's space begins to twist, and you once again return to Mr. Reca's set.

t_ch: 可叹，可叹。
t_en: Alas...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}•忍者未能抵御邪祟的妖术蛊惑，{F#她}{M#他}的开拓•忍道——就此断绝！
t_en: Ninja {NICKNAME} was unable to resist the allure of fiendlings' evil. {F#Her}{M#His} trailblazing way of the ninja has now been severed!

t_ch: 但步入邪祟的国度，{F#她}{M#他}将不再有忧烦愁苦，终日与群猿相伴，尽享无为之乐，余生也算逍遥。
t_en: But upon entering the realm of fiendlings, {F#she}{M#he} felt no more worries or suffering and spent {F#her}{M#his} time with the ape-friends. When every day is drowned in joy, the rest of one's life will also become free and unfettered.

t_ch: 在{NICKNAME}•忍者如贼星坠落之后，其余诸忍亦会延续蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉——
t_en: After Ninja {NICKNAME} fell like a deceitful star, the rest of the ninjas will also banananananaa...

t_en: Bana?

t_ch: 我有种预感……

t_ch: 哼…我同意。

t_ch: 「向我证明，你称得上这力量！」

t_ch: 「在恐惧中抛却凡躯吧，悬锋之王！」

t_ch: 「年轻的神，自苦痛中崛起吧！」

t_ch: 悲鸣、嘶号……

t_ch: 悬锋诸王，这就是你们渴望的力量么？

t_ch: 躁动的力量…难以遏制……

t_ch: 聒噪…！

t_ch: 蛮神，我唾弃你…！

t_ch: （看见他了。在和那头蠢狮子辩论么？）
t_en: (There he is. Is he engaged in a debate with that foolish lion?)

t_ch: 可别跟丢了，鬣…抱歉，是宪兵队的军官们。
t_en: Keep up with us, you hyen... oh, sorry, I meant officers.

t_ch: 你这老头，真是——
t_en: Hey, old man, how dare you—

t_ch: ——大哥，冷静！
t_en: Calm down, calm down!

t_ch: 歌耳戈之子居然是个路痴吗，迈德漠斯？
t_en: Seems like the son of Gorgo has a poor sense of direction, huh?

t_ch: 跟紧了…否则我们的朋友会有意见的。
t_en: Don't fall behind now... unless you want to upset our friends here.

t_ch: 别、别动什么歪脑筋……
t_en: D—Don't you dare try any tricks with us...!

t_ch: 我们快到了。
t_en: We're almost there.

t_ch: 大家来这边。
t_en: Over here, everyone.

t_ch: 前方是……
t_en: That thing ahead...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的祭坛。
t_en: It's the altar of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 但我们要去的地方不是那里，而是左边。
t_en: But that's not our destination. We're heading to the left.

t_ch: 原来这边以前是可以走的啊……
t_en: This place used to be passable, huh...

t_ch: 重渊里还藏着这么隐蔽的地方？
t_en: I never thought there would be such a hidden space in the Abyss.

t_ch: 这里是「预言书库」，当年的仪式重地。
t_en: This is the Archive of Prophecies, an important ceremonial site back then.

t_ch: 多说无益，我们直接上手吧！
t_en: Enough with the talking. Let's just get started!

t_ch: 真厉害。这下，你也具备成为大祭司的资质啦。
t_en: Impressive. You too have the makings of a High Priest now.

t_ch: 啧，要让这石球滚到终点还真不容易…我看着都手抖。
t_en: Tsk, getting that stone ball to the endpoint looks pretty tough... My hands are shaking just from looking at it.

t_ch: 暗门打开了。
t_en: The secret door is open.

t_ch: 里面…就是*我们*长大的地方。
t_en: Go inside... and you'll see the place where we grew up.

t_ch: 我们…在这里稍微多转转吧。
t_en: Let's explore the room a bit.

t_ch: 再往前，去卧房看看吧。
t_en: Let's move on to the bedroom.

t_ch: 她…去哪里了？
t_en: Where... did she go?

t_ch: 原来是条密道……
t_en: It's a secret passage...

t_ch: 这本来是亲圣女派以防不测，为我和母亲准备的暗道……
t_en: It was a secret passage prepared by the Holy Maiden's supporters for Mother and me as a precaution...

t_ch: 今天，它也如期成为*我们*逃出生天的门径。
t_en: And now, it has turned into our passage to escape, just as anticipated.

t_ch: 岁月之泰坦…是你么？
t_en: Time Titan... is that you?

t_ch: 啊，圣女大人！
t_en: Ah, Lady Maiden!

t_ch: 缇里西庇俄丝…说起来，这名字的意思是？
t_en: Tribios... what does that name actually mean?

t_ch: 「拥有三重生命之人」——妈妈认为孩子的诞生是命运三泰坦的赐福，这个名字代表了她的感谢。
t_en: "The one with three lives." Mother believed our birth was blessed by the Three Titans of Fate. She named us thus to express her gratitude.

t_ch: 现在看来…这或许也是一种命运使然。
t_en: Looking at how things have unfolded, fate might have had a role in it.

t_ch: 休想染指…「万径之门」。
t_en: You shall not touch... the Gate of Infinity.

t_ch: 又是你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, it's you again...

t_ch: 啊！吓我一跳……
t_en: Ah! That scared me...

t_ch: 会有人帮助我的……
t_en: Someone will help me...

t_ch: 通路…修复了！
t_en: The passage... is now cleared!

t_ch: 推不动…也翻不过去……
t_en: I can't move it... Can't climb over it either...

t_ch: 谢谢你，无名的神！
t_en: Thank you, nameless god!

t_ch: 最后…{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}宝库就在眼前了。
t_en: Finally... the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} Vault is right ahead.

t_ch: 我来到这里…是为了接过你的命运。
t_en: I've come here... to take on your fate.

t_ch: 有动静！散开，准备——
t_en: It's opening up! Move aside and get ready —

t_ch: 圣女…？
t_en: The Holy Maiden...?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，请为我指引前路！
t_en: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, please guide my path!

t_ch: 这还怎么旁观啊——搭档，我们也上！
t_en: We can't just stand by and do nothing — let's move, partner!

t_ch: 道路…在为我开启。
t_en: The path... is opening up for me.

t_ch: 你这窃贼，别想逃！
t_en: You little thief! You're not getting away!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}…庇护我。
t_en: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... protect me.

t_ch: 上吧，我们也为她开路！
t_en: Let's go! Clear the path for her!

t_ch: 死吧，玷污火种的狗鼠！
t_en: Filthy rat, you'll die for defiling the Coreflame!

t_ch: 跑快点，再快点！
t_en: Run! Go faster!

t_ch: 泰坦站在她那边…小心！
t_en: The Titan is on her side... Watch out!

t_ch: 不可能！众神早就陷入疯狂了！
t_en: Impossible! The gods have long been consumed by madness!

t_ch: 大道肯定有人把守…怎么办？
t_en: The main path is likely well-guarded... What do I do?

t_ch: 果然…快进门…！
t_en: Just as I thought... Inside!

t_ch: 她往那边去了！/ 抓住她！
t_en: She went that way. / Get her!

t_ch: 这里也有人…不要打草惊蛇。
t_en: There are guards here, too. Don't alert them.

t_ch: 终于……
t_en: At long last...

t_ch: 发现了…老鼠！
t_en: Found... a rat!

t_ch: 被三重命途缠绕的神秘天体于忆者之镜中映现——那是「开拓」的下一站目的地，「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。
t_en: A mysterious celestial body entangled by Three Paths appears in the Memokeeper's mirror — Amphoreus, The Eternal Land, the next stop for the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 但降落的过程不算顺利，绝处逢生后，开拓小队结识了当地的「黄金裔」英雄，并从他们口中得知，支撑世界的泰坦诸神正在腐坏，翁法罗斯的大地遍布伤痕。
t_en: But the landing is not a smooth one. After surviving the crash, the Trailblaze squad meets the local Chrysos Heir heroes. They learn from them that the Titans supporting the world are rotting away, and that the land of Amphoreus is covered in scars.

t_ch: 在最后的「圣城」奥赫玛，二人历经波折，取得了黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅的信任。面对来自迷雾之外的威胁，众人决定合力讨伐「纷争」泰坦尼卡多利。
t_en: In Okhema, the final holy city, the two members of the squad undergo great trials and gain the trust of Aglaea, leader of the Chrysos Heirs. Facing a threat from beyond the fog, everyone decides to band together to defeat the Strife Titan Nikador.

t_ch: 为彻底摧毁尼卡多利的正身，众人计划潜入往日的悬锋城捞取真相。在命运重渊的尽头，开拓者谒见「岁月」泰坦欧洛尼斯，神差鬼使间接受了浮黎的瞥视。
t_en: In order to destroy Nikador's true form, the group plans to infiltrate Castrum Kremnos of the past to discover the truth. At the end of the Abyss of Fate, the Trailblazer communes with the Time Titan Oronyx, and somehow receives a gaze from Fuli.

t_ch: 在新伙伴迷迷的协助下，众人将尼卡多利的神性拼凑完整，于决战中夺取了泰坦的火种。终于，在圣地创世涡心，年轻的英雄白厄迎来了自己的试炼……
t_en: With the help of their new friend Mem, everyone pieces together Nikador's divinity and obtains the Titan's Coreflame in the final battle. At last, the young hero Phainon faces his own trial in the holy Vortex of Genesis...

t_ch: 就这样，奥赫玛度过了漫长的一天。
t_en: And so, this long day passed for Okhema.

t_ch: 有人到来、有人离开，就像这段旅程的每一日，在磕磕绊绊中向前。
t_en: Some people arrived, and some left forever, just like every other day of this journey where we, stumbling, move forward.

t_ch: 人们早已做好准备，若要追逐烈火，便要习惯告别。可是……
t_en: We have long been prepared. If we are to chase the flames, then we must grow used to farewells. And yet...

t_ch: 那时，没有人能预见到……
t_en: No one back then could foresee...

t_ch: 「死亡」…它的到来总是那么突然，又刻骨铭心。
t_en: "Death"... Its arrival would always be so sudden and so momentous.

t_ch: 即便是来自天外的{NICKNAME}，也无法逃离死神的十指。而在那场「死亡」的试炼中，人们得到和失去的……
t_en: Even {NICKNAME}, coming from beyond the sky, could not escape the Reaper's two hands. And what people gained and lost in that trial of "Death"...

t_ch: 远比「生命」更加沉重。
t_en: Was far heavier than "Life" itself.

t_ch: 正如，预言为阿蝶揭示的命运……
t_en: Just like the destiny that the prophecy revealed for Cas...

t_ch: 「花海尽头，生者的魂灵将温暖汝之指尖……」
t_en: "At the end of the sea of flowers, the souls of the living shall warm thy fingertips..."

t_ch: …阿格莱雅，恕我直言。
t_en: Aglaea, with all due respect...

t_ch: 这场试炼，太过漫长了。
t_en: This trial is taking far too long.

t_ch: 别慌，相信白厄。
t_en: Don't worry. Have faith in Phainon.

t_ch: 是啊，都好久了…
t_en: Yeah, he's been gone for a while now...

t_ch: 感觉过去四十二天了。
t_en: Bah, it feels like we've already waited for forty-two days.

t_ch: …你怎么得出这么精确的数字的？
t_en: ...How did you even arrive at that number?

t_ch: 吾师，你对此有何见解？
t_en: What do you think of this, Trinnon?

t_ch: 涡心的流向，难以捉摸。只有只言片语，和遥远的战吼……
t_en: It's not possible to tell for sure what goes on within the Vortex. All I can hear are fragments of speech and distant battle cries...

t_ch: 是白厄的声音吗？
t_en: Is it Phainon's voice?

t_ch: 不知道，很难听清……
t_en: I'm not sure. It's difficult to make out clearly...

t_ch: …啊、啊啊！
t_en: ...Ah! Wait, no!

t_ch: 缇宁大人？
t_en: Lady Trinnon?

t_ch: 小白的声音…断掉了……
t_en: Snowy's voice... I can't hear him anymore...

t_ch: 试炼里的东西，就像太阳一样…他要被烧焦了…！
t_en: There's a sun-like existence in the trial... It's burning him up...!

t_ch: 还是到了这一步啊……
t_en: It has come to this, after all...

t_ch: 怎么说？
t_en: What now?

t_ch: 准备好，迈德漠斯。
t_en: Get ready, Mydeimos.

t_ch: 这是要做什么？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: 备用计划——一旦发生变故，我们就把他揪出来。
t_en: Plan B. We pull him out when something goes wrong.

t_ch: 得中止试炼。
t_en: We need to stop the trial now.

t_ch: 不错，是时候执行备用计划了。
t_en: Mm. Time for plan B.

t_ch: 你们要放弃白厄了？
t_en: Are you going to leave Phainon to die?

t_ch: 怎么可能。即便火种意义非凡，拿那个男人的性命来祭祀泰坦也太过可笑。
t_en: Why would we? The Coreflame is important to us, but it's beyond absurd to even consider sacrificing him to the Titans.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅，按照约定，我来介入试炼，救出你们的「救世主」……
t_en: As I promised you, Aglaea, I will intervene in the trial this time, to bring your Deliverer out to safety...

t_ch: …但也仅此而已。
t_en: ...But that's as far as I will go.

t_ch: 当然，眼下我不会苛求更多。
t_en: Of course. I know this is not the time to demand any more from you.

t_ch: 哼，不错。那么，为做好万全准备，希望两位异乡的勇士也能助我一臂之力。
t_en: Hmph, discerning. Alright then, to be as prepared as I can, I hope that the two outlander warriors can also join me.

t_ch: 这…恐怕不妥。火种试炼比寻常仪式复杂得多，若错估作业之理，或逆行，或歪曲，后果不堪设想……
t_en: That... might not be a good idea. The Coreflame trial is many times more complicated than a standard ritual. Even the slightest misjudgment, misstep, or hiccup could result in grave consequences...

t_ch: 两位贵客没有为逐火之旅出生入死的义务，还是由我和万敌阁下同行吧。
t_en: Our two distinguished guests are not obliged to risk their lives for the Flame-Chase Journey. Let me join you instead, Lord Mydei.

t_ch: 没事的，交给我们吧。
t_en: It's fine. We've got this.

t_ch: 说得对，我不想掺和。
t_en: Exactly. No way am I getting involved.

t_ch: 机会难得…火种事关翁法罗斯的世界本质，我们还是一探究竟为好。
t_en: This is a rare opportunity, though... The Coreflame has something to do with the workings of Amphoreus. It's best for us to learn more.

t_ch: 不能大家一起进去吗？
t_en: Can't we all go together?

t_ch: 不行，必须有人待在外面接应。
t_en: No, someone should stay outside in case we need help.

t_ch: 情势危急，又事关白厄的性命，无名客自然当仁不让。我们该怎么做？
t_en: Things have taken a critical turn, especially so with Phainon's life on the line. Of course, we Nameless will do what is necessary. How should we help?

t_ch: 随我一同踏入试炼，找到那家伙，阿格莱雅的金丝会指引我们回到现实……
t_en: Join me in the trial to look for Phainon. And when we do, Aglaea's golden threads will guide us back out...

t_ch: 前提是，你我得在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的怒火下保全自我。
t_en: ...assuming we survive {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} wrath.

t_ch: 遐蝶，如有变数，优先确保他俩的安全——我自有办法杀出一条生路。
t_en: If something bad were to happen, Castorice, your priority is to ensure the safety of these two. I can find a way out on my own.

t_ch: …遵命。
t_en: ...Yes, Lord Mydei.

t_ch: 那就出发吧。感谢两位英勇奉献，由我——
t_en: Thank you both for your valor. Time to get to work, then. Let me have the honor of...

t_ch: ——吹响先攻的号角。
t_en: ...taking the lead in this battle.

t_ch: 愿那战士安然无恙。若做好准备，我便代缇宁为各位主持仪式了。
t_en: May that warrior be safe from harm. When you are ready, I will preside over the ritual on Trinnon's behalf.

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 再等一下。
t_en: Give me a minute.

t_ch: 没关系，做好万全准备才是上策。
t_en: No problem. We should only begin when everyone is fully prepared.

t_ch: 「相拥之后，便是永恒的离别。」
t_en: "And after an embrace... there shall be eternal separation."

t_ch: 天外的援军，高贵的战士，{NICKNAME}与丹恒——
t_en: {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, our reinforcements from beyond the sky, warriors of high esteem—

t_ch: 敬请合上双目，屏住呼吸……
t_en: Please close your eyes and hold your breath...

t_ch: 其人曾令此世命运与诸多挑战者，一同免于「纷争」扼杀……
t_en: They once kept the fate of this world and many other challengers safe from the devastating rage of Strife...

t_ch: 其人将深入神性的试炼，证明摧锋陷坚之志，诚如神谕所示……
t_en: They now seek to venture deep into the trial of divinity and prove their will to destroy our enemies, as foretold by the prophecy...

t_ch: 「纷争」为锤，斗士为砧，炽热与冲击为其刻留伤疤，而半神从中崛起……
t_en: When the hammer of Strife strikes the anvil of the warrior, the heat and impact will leave behind scars, and between them, a demigod shall rise...

t_ch: 「那么，上前来吧——」
t_en: "Very well. Come forth, then..."

t_ch: 「——不应存于此世的灵魂，待锻造的战士。」
t_en: "...Souls foreign to this realm and warriors in the making."

t_ch: 这就是试炼？
t_en: This is the trial?

t_ch: 没二次确认选项吗…
t_en: Why didn't I get a second and final "Confirm" button...?

t_ch: 又见面了，小蓝人！
t_en: Hello! We meet again, Bluey!

t_ch: 「随我穿走迷雾与战火，直面斗士心中，至深恐惧之物——」
t_en: "Follow me into the mist and flames, and come face to face with the greatest fear in the depths of a warrior's heart."

t_ch: 「以尔勇力，推走黑暗，重现普射的阳光——令迷途的诸位战勇，明晰归乡的远途。」
t_en: "And with thy strength, banish the darkness and usher in sunlight — let all lost souls find courage on a long journey back home."

t_ch: 但愿…各位平安无事。
t_en: Please... stay safe.

t_ch: 杂乱的声音…挥之不去……
t_en: We can't get rid of... all the noise...

t_ch: 做好准备，我们也上灵水盆前吧。
t_en: Let's also make our way to the front of the spirit basin when you're ready.

t_ch: 一段时间后……
t_en: Some time later...

t_ch: 白厄因在「纷争」试炼中落败，心智深受泰坦侵蚀，距恢复如初还需些许时日...就让失意的英雄稍息片刻吧。
t_en: Phainon was defeated in the Trial of Strife and had his consciousness corroded by the Titan. It will be some time until he recovers... Let the frustrated hero rest a while.

t_ch: …我尽力了。
t_en: ...I did my best.

t_ch: 火种的试炼…还真是险象环生。但愿白厄安然无恙。
t_en: The Coreflame trial is indeed no place for the weak. Let's just hope that Phainon gets through this.

t_ch: 不必担心。他的魂息尚显平稳，只消静养片刻，镇定心神，便能恢复如初。
t_en: There is no need to worry. His soul is in a stable condition. With ample rest for both body and mind, he'll be up and about in no time.

t_ch: 内心至深的恐惧…白厄阁下，想必是在试炼中看见了自己的过去，还有那倾覆于<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮</color>下的故乡了吧……
t_en: The greatest fear in the depths of his heart... Lord Phainon must have been forced to relive his past during the trial and revisit his homeland that had fallen to the <color=#dbc291ff>black tide</color>...

t_ch: …想来也别无其他可能性。
t_en: ...In all likelihood.

t_ch: 这黑潮有那么可怕吗？
t_en: Is the black tide really that scary?

t_ch: 来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
t_en: Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?

t_ch: 如果是心魔，战胜不了也正常。
t_en: It's only normal to be unable to overcome your inner demons.

t_ch: 来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
t_en: Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?

t_ch: 好像听格奈乌斯提起过…
t_en: I think Gnaeus mentioned it before...

t_ch: 没错，他愿意将火种交给黄金裔…也是寄希望于我们能继续肩负起抗击黑潮的重任。
t_en: That is correct. He was willing to entrust the Coreflame to the Chrysos Heirs... because he was also pinning his hopes on us, to succeed him in shouldering the responsibility of resisting the black tide.

t_ch: 能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
t_en: Could you tell us more about this "black tide"?

t_ch: 是让翁法罗斯众生陷入疯狂的元凶之一。自纷争世起，此种不可名状之物便如同瘟疫，随{RUBY_B#死亡、纷争与诡计}灾厄三泰坦{RUBY_E#}一同降临大地……
t_en: It is one of the culprits that drives the people of Amphoreus to madness. It was during the Era Bellica that this... unspeakable thing first appeared, like a plague, alongside the {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, and Trickery}Three Titans of Calamity{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 我们不知它的源头从何而来，反而发觉它如同包围陆地的大海一般，持续进逼着尚且安宁却已然狭小的土地。也正因此，它才得名为「黑潮」。
t_en: Nobody knows where it came from or how it came to be. What we do know, however, is that it is steadily encroaching upon what little remains of this tranquil land, much like a rising sea closing in on an island from all sides. It is for this very reason that it became known as the "black tide."

t_ch: 凡受其影响者无不变得扭曲狰狞，理性丧失，人性泯灭，化为无血无泪的野兽。而这并非凡人独有的厄运，就连泰坦诸神也无法幸免。
t_en: Those who succumb to it lose their reason and humanity, becoming vicious, mindless monsters. Mortals are not the only ones susceptible to its influence — even gods and Titans cannot escape from it.

t_ch: 根据格奈乌斯的说法，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}虽是灾厄的化身之一，却也肩负着抵御黑潮的使命……
t_en: According to Gnaeus, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, though one of the embodiments of Calamity, also bears the responsibility of fending off the black tide...

t_ch: 或许，这也是另一个原因…让白厄阁下会义无反顾地投入「纷争」的试炼。
t_en: Perhaps that is also why Lord Phainon threw himself into the trial of Strife so readily.

t_ch: 而现在，我们必须另寻他法，尝试点燃「纷争」了。
t_en: But now, we must look for alternative means of igniting the flames of Strife.

t_ch: 说吧，阿格莱雅，下一步怎么走？
t_en: So, Aglaea, what should we do now?

t_ch: 你知道，这不取决于我。
t_en: You know very well the decision doesn't lie with me.

t_ch: 万敌，你身为悬锋的继业者，自然明白：若只是在「纷争」的疆场上取胜，对你们而言易如反掌……
t_en: As the successor to Kremnos, Mydei, you know better than anyone that if it were simply about emerging triumphant on the battlefield of Strife, you and your people could manage it with ease.

t_ch: 但神明职责的重量，终究只能由一人背负。
t_en: But ultimately... the heavy burden of divinity can only be borne by one.

t_ch: 将世界推入死雾的是鲁莽和犹疑，而非悬置的神性。
t_en: It is foolhardiness and indecision, not the unclaimed seat of divinity, that pushes this world into the deathly fog.

t_ch: 「纷争」之试炼告一段落。在阿格莱雅示意下，众人沉默着各自散去。
t_en: The trial of "Strife" is concluded. At Aglaea's signal, the group disperses in silence.

t_ch: 「不可名状」、「不知源头」…这些关键词组合在一起，你会想到什么？
t_en: An "unspeakable" thing of "unknown origin"... What comes to your mind when we put these keywords together?

t_ch: 星核？
t_en: A Stellaron?

t_ch: 不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
t_en: That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.

t_ch: 星神？
t_en: An Aeon?

t_ch: 不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
t_en: That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.

t_ch: 呃…古兽？银河超巨大章鱼？
t_en: Uhh... a Leviathan? A cosmic mega octopus?

t_ch: 这倒是个未曾设想的假说…不过依我见，古兽已在寰宇间销声匿迹近百余纪元，他们是罪魁祸首的概率微乎其微。
t_en: ...A hypothesis like that has never occurred to me, I must admit. But considering how the Leviathan hasn't been sighted in the universe for hundreds of Amber Eras, I think the possibility of it being the culprit is minuscule.

t_ch: 再回想下翁法罗斯的特征吧——这是一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
t_en: Let's think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus instead. An isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power...

t_ch: 我先前就很在意，种种迹象表明，翁法罗斯绝不是一个从未接触过宇宙的世界。无论是泰坦的降生，还是黑潮来袭…都难以用文明的自然发展解释。
t_en: This has been bothering me for a while now. Everything we have seen thus far suggests that Amphoreus wasn't always isolated from the rest of the universe. Be it the birth of the Titans or the encroaching black tide, none of these can be explained as a "natural progression" of a civilization.

t_ch: 它如今的「封闭」一定另有隐情。只是，如果原因也是万界之癌…有些直接或间接的迹象还未得到印证。
t_en: There must be other reasons for its current state of isolation. It's just... if the Cancer of All Worlds is truly the culprit, then we should have observed certain phenomena — explicit or otherwise — by now, but that isn't the case.

t_ch: 星核之声？
t_en: The Voice of the Stellaron?

t_ch: 想到一起去了。依经验来看，你体内的星核应该能与同类产生共鸣。但目前还未出现这种征兆。
t_en: That's what I was thinking too. From past experience, the Stellaron within you should be able to resonate with other Stellarons, but we haven't encountered anything like that here.

t_ch: 反物质军团？
t_en: The Antimatter Legion?

t_ch: 想到一起去了。依经验来看，遭到星核污染的世界，多少都与「毁灭」有点关系。
t_en: That's what I was thinking too. From past experience, the Destruction has always been involved in some way when it comes to a world corrupted by a Stellaron.

t_ch: 星核猎手？
t_en: The Stellaron Hunters?

t_ch: 想到一起去了。依经验来看，凡有星核的世界，必定能见到星核猎手出没。
t_en: That's what I was thinking too. From past experience, Stellaron Hunters are certain to appear on a world with a Stellaron.

t_ch: 不仅如此，还有其他疑点悬而未决。直觉告诉我，恐怕没那么简单……
t_en: There are several other unanswered questions, too. My gut feeling is that things here are not as simple as they seem...

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的历史也证明了，一个世界的样貌未必是一条命途作用的结果。
t_en: Furthermore, what happened in Penacony also proved that the appearance of a world may not necessarily be due to the influence of just one Path.

t_ch: 无所谓，「开拓」会打十个。
t_en: No sweat! The Trailblaze can tackle even ten Paths if it must!

t_ch: 哎…有气势是好事。
t_en: *sigh* It's good to be motivated at least.

t_ch: 这大抵也是一种全明星吧。
t_en: It could be an all-star cast.

t_ch: 呵…另一种意义上的匹诺康尼啊。
t_en: Heh... In another sense, it's Penacony all over again.

t_ch: 没准是阿基维利自产自销呢。
t_en: Who knows, maybe Akivili's behind it all.

t_ch: 我想…就连虚构史学家也不敢轻易采用这种设定。
t_en: ...Not even the History Fictionologists would dare to spin a tale like that.

t_ch: 事已至此，边走边看吧。就把黑潮当作一个突破口，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}既已陨落，受其压制的力量也必将开始反扑……
t_en: For now, let's just take things as they come. The black tide could be a good starting point. Since {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen, those who were suppressed by them will no doubt begin to counterattack now.

t_ch: 看来…我们的「开拓」之旅，意义愈发重大了啊。
t_en: It seems our trailblazing expedition is growing in significance...
(What...)

t_ch: 怎么，感到错愕么？
t_en: What's the matter? Surprised?

t_ch: 凡有「纷争」，必有杀戮…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的试炼是这惨状也不足为奇。
t_en: Where there's Strife, there's carnage... It shouldn't come as a surprise to see such a sight in {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} trial.

t_ch: 这是…你做的？
t_en: You... did this?

t_ch: 我方才说了，这只是试炼的影子。
t_en: I told you, this is only a mirror of the trial.

t_ch: 出发吧，去找白厄。
t_en: Let's go look for Phainon.

t_ch: 就你一个？丹恒呢？
t_en: Why is it just you? Where's Dan Heng?

t_ch: 你那位同伴似乎不在附近…我们先走。但愿他平安。
t_en: I don't see him around here... We should go first. Let's pray he stays safe.

t_ch: 快躲起来，躲在家里！
t_en: Hurry, hide in the house!

t_ch: 小心这群吃人的野兽！
t_en: Watch out for those man-eating beasts!

t_ch: 「心中至深恐惧之物」…那男人最畏惧的，竟是这副景色？
t_en: "The greatest fear in the depths of a warrior's heart," huh? ...So, this is what he fears the most?

t_ch: 野蛮人！告诉我你的名字，好让你那可悲的命运作我酒宴上的谈资！
t_en: Tell me your name, brute! Your demise shall be a tale I boast about at the feast table!

t_ch: 我名为帕狄卡斯…前来为我同胞复仇。
t_en: My name is Perdikkas... And I am here to avenge my people.

t_ch: 悬锋人…在和奥赫玛人交战？
t_en: Kremnoans... and Okhemans are at war?

t_ch: 哈哈…帕狄卡斯！就连牲口待宰时的哀嚎都要比这名字更动听。
t_en: Hahaha! ...Perdikkas? Even the tragic cries of beasts at the slaughterhouse sound better than your name!

t_ch: 随你怎么说，下贱的奥赫玛人……
t_en: Say whatever you like, despicable Okheman...

t_ch: 「宁战死，毋荣归」——悬锋精神将永远捍卫我！
t_en: "Valorous Death Before Glorious Return." May the Kremnoan spirit always watch over me!

t_ch: 愚蠢的野蛮人，既然你急着寻死，我就成全你！
t_en: Foolish brute! I see you're eager to die. Very well then, I shall grant you just that!

t_ch: 立即出手，阻止士兵。
t_en: Intervene and stop the soldier.

t_ch: 你是…呵，野狗的首领竟自己送上门了？
t_en: You are...? Oh, so the alpha brute has found his way here?

t_ch: 可惜，太晚了！你们挡不住圣城的兵锋——就先拿你这可悲的臣子祭旗！
t_en: It's a pity, though... You're too late! You will never stop the holy city's army. Watch as I make this pathetic warrior of yours the first sacrifice!

t_ch: 啊…啊……
t_en: Urk... Hngh...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...

t_ch: 为我…复仇吧…！
t_en: Avenge... me...!

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 下一个，就是你！
t_en: You're next!

t_ch: 静观其变，等待试炼。
t_en: Watch on and wait for the trial.

t_ch: 死吧，猪猡——！
t_en: Die, you swine!

t_ch: 啊…啊……
t_en: Urk... Hngh...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...

t_ch: 为何要将我们…弃置于异邦的屠刀下？
t_en: Why... why did you leave us to the mercy of these foreigners?

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 你是…呵，野狗的首领竟自己送上门了！
t_en: You are...? Oh, so the alpha brute has found his way here!

t_ch: 既然悬锋人都急着送死——那我就给你个痛快！
t_en: You Kremnoans are all eager to die, huh? Then I shall grant you a swift death!

t_ch: *身体扭曲的崩裂声*
t_en: *sound of a body contorting and snapping*

t_ch: 懦弱的王啊…去死吧…！
t_en: Face your death, cowardly king...!

t_ch: …荒唐透顶。我认得这奥赫玛人，他是个磊落的战士，却被「纷争」捏造成了这般扭曲模样。
t_en: ...Absurd. I know this Okheman. Strife contorted an honorable warrior into this perverse and twisted being.

t_ch: 还有这聒噪的声音…它响起时，心中的杀意便难以遏制。
t_en: And that horrible noise... I can hardly suppress my bloodlust when it sounds.

t_ch: 白厄一定是被这战吼冲昏头脑，迷失了自我…哼，没用的家伙。
t_en: This battle cry must have gotten to Phainon. That's why he lost himself... Hmph, what a useless fool.

t_ch: 他是谁？
t_en: Who is he?

t_ch: 你的表情很凝重啊…
t_en: Why so solemn...

t_ch: …没什么，走吧。
t_en: ...It's nothing. Let's go.

t_ch: 哈…哈哈……
t_en: Ha... Haha...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…这就是我为您献上的祭品……
t_en: Please accept my offering, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 此人沉浸于杀戮的狂热中，对你熟视无睹。
t_en: This person is consumed by a frenzy of slaughter, oblivious to your presence.

t_ch: 来吧，懦夫！{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}将给我力量，随我一同血战至死亡的疆界！
t_en: Come at me, coward! {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will grant me strength and fight alongside me to the death!

t_ch: 哼，口气不小…可悲的狗鼠，和你们那懦弱的王有得一拼！
t_en: Hmph, those are some big words for a pathetic rat like you... No different from your cowardly king!

t_ch: 此人膀肘上的筋腱遭锋快的铜枪扎裂，垂着断臂，如破溃的酒壶般碎落在路边。
t_en: A sharp bronze spear had torn through the tendons in her arm, leaving it hanging lifelessly, like a shattered wine jug abandoned by the roadside.

t_ch: 随着魂息离去，黑暗蒙住了此人的双眼。
t_en: As the soul ebbed away, darkness veiled her eyes.

t_ch: 呃啊…！
t_en: Urk...!

t_ch: 这声音…是哈托努斯？
t_en: That voice... is Chartonus?

t_ch: 迈德漠斯，你是……
t_en: Mydeimos, you are...

t_ch: 破坏一切，卑劣的王…来取我性命，终于？
t_en: Destroyed all, the wicked king... Here to take my life, finally?

t_ch: 我不会问这一切因何而起，也不会如你所说，伤你分毫。
t_en: I won't ask how this happened, nor will I hurt you like you said.

t_ch: 我只要你告诉我，白厄身在何处？
t_en: I just need you to tell me where Phainon is.
